name: Unusual S3 Bucket Access Detected
description: An unusual access pattern to an S3 bucket has been detected, which could indicate an attempt at data exfiltration or critical information reconnaissance in the cloud.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the earliest event in the aggregation window.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The AWS user or role identity that accessed the S3 bucket.

parameters.name: bucket_name
parameters.description: The name of the S3 bucket that was accessed.

parameters.name: access_type
parameters.description: The type of S3 operation performed (e.g., GET).

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the S3 access originated.

parameters.name: bytes_transferred
parameters.description: The total number of bytes transferred during the access, if available in logs.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The total count of access events within the aggregation window.
